title: Keely Phenomenological PASS: 17 laws classified as Theorem NT observer projections
_fixture_purpose: Certifies Keely's 17 phenomenological laws (Category 5, Vibes framework) as observer projections under Theorem NT. All describe continuous measurements that REVEAL discrete QA structure but never feed back causally. Signal = EFFECT (Vibes).

theorem_nt_compliance.boundary_crossings: exactly 2: (1) input -> observer layer, (2) QA layer -> output

13.name: Law of Sono-thermity
13.keely_text: Internal vibrations capable of vibrating at a period-frequency directly as their density, inversely as their linear dimensions

14.name: Law of Oscillating Atoms
14.keely_text: All atoms when in tension are capable of oscillating at a pitch inversely as the cube of their Atomic weights

15.name: Law of Vibrating Atomolic Substances
15.keely_text: Atoms capable of vibrating at pitch inversely as the Dyne and as the atomic volume, directly as the Atomic weight
15.continuous_observable: gravity coefficient, atomic volume, atomic weight

19.name: Law of Variation of Atomic Pitch by Rad-energy
19.keely_text: Higher harmonics and overtones of projected rad-energy cause the atom to expand

20.name: Law of Variation of Atomic Pitch by Electricity and Magnetism
20.keely_text: Electricity and Magnetism produce internal vibrations followed by proportional changes in volume and pitch
20.continuous_observable: electric field, magnetic field, volume change

21.name: Law of Variation of Atomic Pitch by Temperature
21.keely_text: Atoms in chemical combination oscillate with increasing amplitude directly as the temperature

22.name: Law of Pitch of Atomic Oscillation
22.keely_text: Atoms in tension oscillate at a pitch that is a resultant of Atomic weight, volume, and tension

23.name: Law of Variation of Atomic Oscillation by Pressure
23.keely_text: Frequency of atomic oscillation increases and diminishes inversely as the square of the pressure

24.name: Law of Variation of Atomic Oscillation by Temperature
24.keely_text: The force of cohesion diminishes inversely as the square of the distance the atoms are apart

25.name: Law of Variation of Atomic Oscillation by Electricity
25.keely_text: Electric current destroys cohesion and chemical tension directly as square of current

26.name: Law of Variation of Atomic Oscillation by Sono-thermism
26.keely_text: Diminishes the tensions directly as the quantity of heat developed

30.name: Law of Chemical Substitution
30.keely_text: Describes substitution conditions in chemical compounds
30.discrete_qa_source: f-value concordance between substitute and host

31.name: Law of Catalysis
31.keely_text: The presence of harmonics and discords
31.note: Condition is structural but catalytic EFFECT is observed

32.name: Law of Molecular Synthesis and Combination (Organic)
32.keely_text: The molecular pitch must be a derived harmony of the radicals
32.discrete_qa_source: f-value as derived harmony of component pairs
32.note: Borderline Cat 4/5: states constraint but molecular pitch is measured

36.name: Law of Heat
36.keely_text: Atoms under tension of chemical combination oscillate with amplitude directly as temperature, inversely as pressure, as square of specific heat

38.name: Law of Cohesion
38.keely_text: Cohesion diminishes directly as the square root of pressure and temperature, and as the square of electric intensity
38.discrete_qa_source: coupling coefficient decay under external perturbation

39.name: Law of Refractive Indices
39.keely_text: A table of refractive indices indicates molecular pitch; with crystalline form the phase of molecular oscillation
39.note: Most explicitly bidirectional: continuous measurement REVEALS discrete structure

witnesses.theorem_nt: These measurements are observer OUTPUTS — they describe what the discrete structure produces, not what drives it
witnesses.note: Laws 13-15 form a cluster: frequency-density-weight-dimension relationships

witnesses.description: Variation laws — how pitch/oscillation changes under external conditions
witnesses.qa_source: orbit transition, coupling modulation, dissociation threshold
witnesses.theorem_nt: The VARIATION is observed continuously; the underlying STATE CHANGE is discrete (orbit transition or coupling change)
witnesses.note: 8 laws all follow pattern: continuous variable -> observed change in pitch/oscillation

witnesses.description: Chemical process laws — substitution, catalysis, synthesis
witnesses.continuous_domain: reaction rates, catalytic effects, molecular properties
witnesses.qa_source: f-value concordance, harmonic relationships, derived harmonies
witnesses.theorem_nt: The chemical PROCESS is observed; the structural CONDITION (concordance/harmony) is discrete
witnesses.note: Borderline laws: structural conditions produce phenomenological effects

witnesses.qa_source: coupling coefficients, orbit stability, f-value as molecular pitch
witnesses.theorem_nt: Law 39 is most explicitly bidirectional: refractive index REVEALS discrete pitch, creating a measurement bridge
witnesses.note: Law 39 = observer projection that points BACK at discrete structure

cross_references.name: QA Keely Structural Ratio Cert
cross_references.relation: Sibling: the discrete invariants these laws project
